Uses of Class
javashooter.playground.Playground

Packages that use Playground
Package
Description
javashooter.controller
The javashooter.controller package contains Object controllers that govern an objects behavior, without being involved in its collision or drawing properties.
javashooter.gameobjects
This package contains the class GameObject and some subclasses defined for convenience and ease of use.
javashooter.gameutils
 
javashooter.playground
The package javashooter.playground contains all classes implementing and describing game levels.
javashooter.ui
Package that contains all that is UI-related: GameUI implements the main game window with menu and pushbuttons, and GamePanel defines the part of the main window where the actual game is painted.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Playground
    GameLoop.nextLevel(Playground currentLevel)
    defines the levels of the game, overwrite if you want to define own levels.

    Modifier and Type

    abstract Playground

    defines the levels of the game, overwrite if you want to define own levels.
